items.title: A Very Different World Cup
items.summary: With a host country actively at war with a participating nation, this year’s tournament is set to be unlike any other.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: US and Iran exchange strikes across Middle East for second day in a row
items.summary: The US carries out strikes on military targets in southern Iran. Tehran responds by targeting US military assets in Kuwait, Bahrain and Jordan.
